message:
feat(pt-core): add streaming sketches for high-rate events

Implements process_triage-nao.5 with memory-bounded approximate data
structures for summarizing high-volume event streams:

- CountMinSketch: Approximate frequency counting with bounded error
- SpaceSaving: Heavy hitters / top-k frequent items detection
- TDigest: Quantile estimation with bounded memory
- SketchManager: Combined manager for tracking metrics

All sketches have bounded memory independent of stream length:
- CountMinSketch: O(depth × width)
- SpaceSaving: O(k) where k is the desired number of heavy hitters
- TDigest: O(compression) where compression controls accuracy

Includes 21 unit tests covering all functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
